traits.locale_text:
When the user is hit, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} temporary wounds for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was blocked or parried. Does not stack.
The user's armour is increased by +{uip|Armour|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c}%.

When the user is hit, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} temporary wounds for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was blocked or parried. Does not stack.
The user's armour is increased by +{uip|Armour|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c}%.

When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

When the user is hit, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} temporary wounds for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was blocked or parried. Does not stack.
The user's armour is increased by +{uip|Armour|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c}%.

When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|Armour|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c}%.

languages.text: Когда по обладателю аугмента {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g}, он получает +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временного здоровья{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Этот эффект срабатывает, даже если атака встретила {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блок{/g} или была {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирована{/g}. Эффект не суммируется.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text:
Когда по обладателю аугмента {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g}, он получает +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временного здоровья{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Этот эффект срабатывает, даже если атака встретила {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блок{/g} или была {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирована{/g}. Эффект не суммируется.
{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Броня{/g} обладателя аугмента увеличивается на {uip|Armour|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c}%.

Когда по обладателю аугмента {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g}, он получает +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временного здоровья{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Этот эффект срабатывает, даже если атака встретила {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блок{/g} или была {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирована{/g}. Эффект не суммируется.
{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Броня{/g} обладателя аугмента увеличивается на {uip|Armour|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c}%.

languages.text: Cuando el usuario recibe un {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacto{/g}, gana +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}heridas temporales{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Este efecto se activa incluso aunque el ataque se haya {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloqueado{/g} o {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parado{/g}, pero no es acumulativo.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. languages.text: Erleidet der Nutzer einen {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffer{/g}, erhält er 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporäre Wunden {/g}. Dieser Effekt wird auch im Falle eines {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}geblockten{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parierten{/g} Angriffs ausgelöst. Nicht stapelbar.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Erleidet der Nutzer einen {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffer{/g}, erhält er 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporäre Wunden {/g}. Dieser Effekt wird auch im Falle eines {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}geblockten{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parierten{/g} Angriffs ausgelöst. Nicht stapelbar.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurulduğunda{/g} +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanı kazanır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. Bu etki, saldırıya karşı {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloklama{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} yapılsa bile tetiklenir. Etki üst üste birikmez.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurulduğunda{/g} +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanı kazanır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. Bu etki, saldırıya karşı {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloklama{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} yapılsa bile tetiklenir. Etki üst üste birikmez.

languages.text: Lorsque l'utilisateur est {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touché{/g}, il gagne +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Cet effet se déclenche même si l'attaque est {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquée{/g} ou {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parée{/g}. Non cumulable.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Lorsque l'utilisateur est {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touché{/g}, il gagne +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Cet effet se déclenche même si l'attaque est {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquée{/g} ou {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parée{/g}. Non cumulable.

languages.text: 被{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}时，使用者获得{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c}点{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。即使攻击被{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}格挡{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}，此效果也会触发。此效果不可叠加。
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: 被{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}时，使用者获得{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c}点{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。即使攻击被{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}格挡{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}，此效果也会触发。此效果不可叠加。

languages.text: 使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}されたとき、1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間+{uip|THP|fdbac6922400427e92a08d56391ce24c}の{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}一時負傷{/g}を得る。この効果は、攻撃が{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}ブロック{/g}または{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}受け流し{/g}された場合でも発動する。スタックしない。
